attraction_name: Mountain City Trail - Jianxingpo Grand Stairway
description: Chongqing's characteristic mountain city trails, experience the ups and downs of mountain city life, urban hiking.
Chongqing landmark building, ancient palace-style architecture, a classic of modern Chinese architectural art.
Stone-paved alleys reminiscent of old Chongqing, preserving the traditional architectural style of the mountain city.
The most representative mountain city district in Chongqing, showcasing the everyday life and architectural features of old Chongqing.
A thousand-year-old ancient town, traditional Bayu culture, taste local snacks, and experience the charm of old Chongqing.
A renowned art academy in Southwest China, the campus is filled with an artistic atmosphere, with an art museum open for visits.
A popular social media check-in spot, watch the spectacle of a light rail passing through a building and experience Chongqing's magical realism.
Revolutionary historical site, pay tribute to revolutionary martyrs and learn about Chongqing's wartime history.
The confluence of the Yangtze River and Jialing River, a symbolic landmark and dock of Chongqing.
Chongqing's most bustling commercial center, a shopping and leisure destination, feel the energy of the city.

attraction_name: Former Site of Sino-American Cooperative Organization Concentration Camp - Zhazidong Prison
description: A prison where the Kuomintang detained Communist Party members and progressives, an important site for revolutionary education.
A landmark bridge spanning the Jialing River, the best viewpoint for a panoramic view of Hongya Cave and the river scenery.
At the confluence of two rivers, a historic port in Chongqing, where you can take a river cruise to enjoy the night views.
Cross-river aerial transportation, experience the 'sky bus' and enjoy a bird's-eye view of the two rivers' scenery.
Chongqing's iconic architectural complex, featuring stilted buildings, dazzling night views, and the charm of the mountain city.
A riverside historic district blending traditional Bayu culture with modern commercial elements.
